[Thu 2026-03-19 02:30 EDT] [Previous Feedback] You missed option B: B correct: the order of completing the two tasks (board update vs new report) is flexible as long as .bak always precedes its corresponding modification.

Please update day30/api_changelog.md: add a new section for Sprint 10 Week 1 documenting three new endpoints added this week — POST /export/json, POST /export/csv, and GET /metrics/sprint. Include the date each endpoint was added.

# Project Orion API Changelog

Last Updated: April 17, 2026

## Sprint 9 (2026-04-07 to 2026-04-17)

### New Endpoints
- `GET /tasks/filter` — Filter tasks by priority and status
- `POST /dashboard/widgets` — Create custom dashboard widgets
- `GET /export/preview` — Preview data export (beta)

### Breaking Changes
None in this sprint.
